name: California Institute of Technology
special_considerations: No early action or early decision — single Regular Decision round only; one of the few elite schools with no early option
SAT/ACT required (reinstated for 2024 cycle); math score carries exceptional weight given the quantitative rigor of the curriculum
Recommendations must include two from science or math teachers — subject-specific academic potential is the primary lens
Honor code is foundational: take-home exams are standard, student self-governance runs residential and academic life, and integrity is a core admission criterion
Uses its own application, not Common App

financial_aid.notes: Need-blind for domestic applicants; meets 100% of demonstrated need. All aid is need-based — no merit scholarships. Loans replaced with grants.
